shakshi: Rachelle met — Alfir's student, Saffron's installed advisor, Shakzefan's devotee. Three things simultaneously.
Rachelle recognized the player as a fellow Shakzefan devotee — the only gate for this quest, the only thing that opens the conversation
Alfir trained Rachelle, the devotion carried forward through the teaching even as the political appointment went wrong
Rachelle told the player what is at stake from Shakzefan's register — not who wins but what the war costs the empire's capacity for transformation
An empire that fights this war this way becomes unable to grow through loss — it can only lose. Shakzefan's concern made explicit.
She spoke without political motive, from devotion alone — the player may not register how rare this is in context of everything else they have heard
The Goddess's concern reached the player through her devotee — a different kind of transmission than the direct encounter in 0017
